title: deserialize_profile_fields: visitor pattern enforces per-entry and total bounds
description: Profile.fields uses a custom MapAccess Visitor that enforces both total entry count (max 64) and per-key/value size (max 1024 bytes) before any entry is inserted into the HashMap. A contributor might suggest replacing it with a post-decode check on the HashMap. The Visitor approach is superior: it rejects the first oversized entry without allocating the rest of the map, and enforces the total count without materializing a HashMap::len() call. Preserve the Visitor.
